opportunities.title: WISP: AI for Next-Gen SOC Summit (Virtual)
opportunities.description: Virtual summit focused on AI applications in security operations. Free with WISP code. Good opportunity to reconnect with the WISP community ahead of in-person events.

opportunities.title: Women in Tech SF 2026
opportunities.description: In-person networking event for women in tech. Mix and mingle with peers, founders, and leaders across the SF tech scene. Held at Toy Soldier (52 Belden Pl, SF 94104). 6–9pm.

opportunities.title: AI Tinkerers SF — Offensive Security Demo Night
opportunities.description: Monthly SF meetup for AI practitioners and builders. This edition: Offensive Security Demo Night — AI-powered security research tools and techniques. Good crossover for AI governance and red-teaming perspectives.

opportunities.title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026
opportunities.description: World's largest technical AI conference — 250+ speakers, 20+ tracks, 6,000+ attendees including VPs of AI, founders, and AI engineers. Tracks include governance, safety, and enterprise AI. Runs June 29–July 2 at Moscone West — overlaps with Ann Arbor departure.

opportunities.title: RVATech Data & AI Summit 2026 — Call for Speakers
opportunities.description: Regional tech conference in Richmond, VA focused on data engineering, AI/ML, and analytics. Open CFP for talks on data governance, AI strategy, and technical leadership. Good fit for AI governance and data science backgrounds.

opportunities.title: AI Tinkerers Ann Arbor — Monthly Meetup
opportunities.description: Monthly Ann Arbor chapter of the AI Tinkerers network — 3-hour meetups with lightning demos across LLM agents, computer vision, robotics, and applied AI. Draws ML engineers, researchers, and founders from the UM/Ann Arbor tech ecosystem.

opportunities.title: Ann Arbor AI/ML Meetup — Monthly
opportunities.description: Community meetup focused on machine learning, data science, and AI applications in the Ann Arbor / Ypsilanti area. Typically meets the first Thursday of each month at SPARK Central Innovation Center. Free, with pizza and socializing.

opportunities.title: A2 New Tech — Monthly Startup & Tech Meetup
opportunities.description: Monthly Ann Arbor SPARK event featuring startup pitches, demos, and networking happy hour. Draws founders, engineers, investors, and tech leaders from the Ann Arbor ecosystem. Free. Typically held mid-month at SPARK venues.
